title: Practice Admin non-media tacit item inline meta edit
goal: Add a minimal metadata correction path for existing non-media practice_tacit_items by editing title, body, and sensory fields inline from the admin drilldown without changing type, group, or sort order
constraints: non-media tacit items only; do not edit step_group_id, tacit_type, or sort_order; no CSS/schema/RPC changes; preserve selectedMenuIdRef stale-guard; do not call setSummary; worker docs only as allowed auxiliary files
acceptance: build pass; lint pass with only pre-existing src/hooks/useGameTick.ts:73 warning; self-reviewer approved; tsc pass; regression vitest 5종 pass; files_changed limited to scope plus allowed worker docs; extra_changes false; admin drilldown text tacit card updates immediately after save; body and sensory empty strings normalized to null; menu change resets edit draft/error/saving safely
